title: Support Radix color tokens in parser/CLI/demos
description: Add Radix light/dark token registry and parsing support (gray11, dark.gray11, grayDark11) across shared color parser, CLI, and clock demo arguments.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented: generated static Radix light/dark token registry, extended parse_color, updated CLI/demo color argument support, and added tests for Radix token parsing.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Validation complete: Radix registry + parser + CLI/demo integration in place; tests passing (53). Ready for user palette selection.
